description: Create a Kubernetes microservices architecture diagram for the Google Online Boutique application using the service manifest at ~/Desktop/boutique_services.yaml. The resulting diagram at ~/Desktop/boutique_architecture.drawio must include two pages: 'Service Architecture' and 'Service Inventory'. The 'Service Architecture' page must visualize all 11 microservices, the Redis data store, and an Ingress/Gateway, with connections following the dependencies in the YAML, labeled by protocol (gRPC or HTTP), and enclosed in a Kubernetes Namespace boundary. The 'Service Inventory' page must contain a table listing each service's name, language, and port. Export the 'Service Architecture' page as a PNG to ~/Desktop/boutique_architecture.png.
